# Handoff Template

Use this template when passing work from one role to another.

## From

Role or person sending the handoff.

## To

Role or person receiving the handoff.

## Task summary

One-paragraph summary of what was done or discovered.

## What is complete

- completed item 1
- completed item 2

## Evidence

- files reviewed or changed
- tests or checks run
- documents updated

## Open questions

- unresolved item 1
- unresolved item 2

## Risks

- risk 1
- risk 2

## Recommended next action

What should happen next and why.

## Blocking conditions

Anything the next role must resolve before proceeding.
